Meaning.Vi: muối (chất hóa học NaCl, thường dùng để nêm gia vị)
Meaning.En: A white crystalline compound, sodium chloride, used as a seasoning and preservative in food.
Meaning.Example: She added a pinch of salt to the soup to enhance the flavor.

Situation.Vi: Cho muối vào món ăn khi nấu hoặc ăn để tăng vị mặn.
Situation.En: Adding salt to food during cooking or at the table to season it.

Situation.Vi: Sử dụng muối để bảo quản thực phẩm như cá muối, dưa muối.
Situation.En: Using salt to preserve foods, such as salted fish or pickled vegetables.

Meaning.En: To treat or season something with salt.
Meaning.Example: The chef salted the steak before grilling it.

Situation.Vi: Rắc muối lên món ăn trước khi nướng hoặc chiên.
Situation.En: Sprinkling salt on food before cooking to season it.
